---
toc: false
---

<center>
## Books
</center>

:::{style='font-size: 1.1em;'}

[**DO4DS: Lab Solutions**](https://mjfrigaard.github.io/do4ds-labs/) (**in development**): Lab solutions for [DevOps for Data Science](https://do4ds.com/)  [[**Repo**](https://github.com/mjfrigaard/do4ds-labs)]

[**Personal Finance: a field manual**](https://mjfrigaard.github.io/fm-finance/) (**in development**): a working reference for the day-to-day decisions that shape your financial life: budgeting, savings, borrowing, investing, taxes, insurance, and planning (with code examples in R and Python) [[**Repo**](https://github.com/mjfrigaard/fm-finance)]

[**Shiny App-Packages**](https://mjfrigaard.github.io/shiny-app-pkgs/): creating a Shiny application in an R package [[**Repo**](https://github.com/mjfrigaard/shiny-app-pkgs) | [**R package**](https://github.com/mjfrigaard/shinypak)]

[**fm-ggp2**](https://mjfrigaard.github.io/fm-ggp2/): a `ggplot2` field manual [[**Repo**](https://github.com/mjfrigaard/fm-ggp2)]


:::
